input: A remote employee cannot connect to the company VPN after a client update and needs access restored today
A contractor needs temporary admin access to an internal finance tool for a two-day audit
Multiple users report that the internal scheduling app is down across two regions
An urgent firewall rule change is needed to restore connectivity for a partner integration before a live demo
A new employee needs baseline access to the reporting portal and shared drive before Monday onboarding
A VIP user says their MFA prompts stopped appearing and they are locked out of the VPN
The internal wiki is reachable, but edits are failing for several teams after a permissions rollout
A change request proposes tuning a backend configuration setting in the identity platform before the maintenance window
A requester asks for access to a sensitive admin console but does not specify which environment or why
An incident triage bot recommends a rollback, but a human incident commander must choose whether to proceed
